subject: Re: WarpTools is awesome, but I miss the GUI for checking CTF fits
body:
Hi Jesse,

I also would love such a functionality. Did you find a workaround to 
display the CTF estimation results?

Cheers,
Lorenz

Jesse Hansen schrieb am Freitag, 19. Juli 2024 um 12:41:43 UTC+2:

> hi, 
>
> thanks so much for WarpTools.  It's phenomenal.  Definitely a game changer 
> for our pipelines.  
>
> It seems like it's reasonable to use command line for all features of this 
> processing, except perhaps one point I can think of.  When I check the CTF 
> fits of the tilt series I sometimes have to play around a bit with the CTF 
> fitting params, process for a single TS, check the fit, and repeat as 
> needed.  Do you have a suggestion on how to circumvent this need?  Perhaps 
> is it possible to view to CTF estimation results in the windows GUI then 
> continue processing in WarpTools?
>
> thanks again!
>
> best
>
> Jesse 
>
>
>
